name: magi-cp-e2e
description: D73 — opt-in end-to-end harness for the magi-cp dashboard. Drives Playwright against a docker-compose stack and (optionally) spawns `claude -p` to fire real CC hooks for runtime-side assertions. NOT wired into npm test, npm run build, or CI; runs on demand via npm run e2e:* from a workflow final-smoke step.
